name: ShoppingCart
description: Implementation of the 'ShoppingCart' model. Represents a shopping cart.

CartItems.description: Contains information about the items in the shopping cart.

SubTotal.description: The cart’s total cost before taxes and discounts were applied.

DiscountTotal.description: The monetary amount removed from the cart’s total cost by applied discounts.

TaxTotal.description: The monetary amount paid in taxes, included in the cart’s `GrandTotal`.

GrandTotal.description: The cart’s total cost, including taxes and discounts.

Transactions.description: Contains information returned from the first call to CheckoutShoppingCart.

SaleId.description: The ID of the sale associated with the shopping cart.
